items.acceptance_criteria: Machine-readable evidence proves authenticated ingress is enforced for remote /mcp.
items.remediation: Add an attestation covering the deployed ingress auth layer for remote /mcp.
items.title: Remote /mcp requires authenticated ingress policy

items.acceptance_criteria: Machine-readable evidence proves OAuth/OIDC or equivalent remote auth is deployed.
items.remediation: Add an attestation for OAuth/OIDC or equivalent remote auth on /mcp.
items.title: OAuth 2.1/OIDC or equivalent protects remote /mcp

items.acceptance_criteria: Evidence covers non-root execution, isolation, and network restriction posture.
items.remediation: Add attestation evidence for hardened runtime and network segmentation controls.
items.title: Runtime hardening and network restrictions are evidenced

items.acceptance_criteria: All minimum-bar controls pass in the strict profile.
items.rationale: Minimum-bar checklist failed due to: OMCP-ARCH-002, OMCP-AUTH-001, OMCP-DEPLOY-001
items.remediation: Close every failing minimum-bar control before claiming OWASP MCP baseline compliance.
items.title: OWASP MCP minimum bar checklist passes

items.acceptance_criteria: Evidence shows the deployed service enforces per-session quotas or equivalent controls.
items.remediation: Add attested evidence for per-session quotas or implement them directly.
items.title: Per-session quotas are evidenced

items.acceptance_criteria: Checked transport code does not forward client bearer tokens to upstream services.
items.rationale: Bearer tokens are forwarded upstream by the map proxy.
items.remediation: Remove token passthrough and use server-held or brokered credentials instead.
items.title: Token passthrough is prohibited

items.acceptance_criteria: Evidence shows tokens are short-lived, scoped, and bound to user or client identity.
items.remediation: Add attestation evidence for token TTL, scopes, and subject binding.
items.title: Short-lived scoped tokens are evidenced

items.acceptance_criteria: Evidence shows secret injection or equivalent controls prevent plain env-var-only exposure.
items.remediation: Add attestation evidence for vault or secret-injection controls, or remove raw env-secret dependency.
items.title: Secrets delivery is controlled beyond plain env vars

items.acceptance_criteria: Evidence shows long-lived sessions are compartmentalized against prompt carry-over risk.
items.remediation: Add deployment or runtime evidence for session/task compartmentalization.
items.title: Long-lived sessions have compartmentalization evidence

items.acceptance_criteria: Machine-readable evidence exists for tool-change approval and review policy.
items.remediation: Add an attestation for the tool approval workflow or wire the workflow into CI evidence.
items.title: Tool additions and changes have approval evidence

items.acceptance_criteria: Machine-readable evidence exists for peer review of security-sensitive changes.
items.remediation: Add attestation evidence for branch protection or required review policy.
items.title: Security-sensitive change review is evidenced

items.acceptance_criteria: Attested evidence exists for monitoring, alerting, and log routing.
items.remediation: Add attestation evidence for monitoring, SIEM ingestion, and alerting policy.
items.title: Monitoring and alerting evidence exists
